zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Badlesmere於1304年12月3日出生在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫時，她的父親Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere29歲，母親Margaret de Clare17歲。她於1316年11月25日之前與William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年10月18日在英國越可爾爾姆斯利享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Badlesmere于1304年12月3日出生在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫时，她的父亲Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere29岁，母亲Margaret de Clare17岁。她于1316年11月25日之前与William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1363年10月18日在英国越可爾爾姆斯利享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Badlesmere was born on 3 December 1304, in Badlesmere, Kent, England, her father, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, was 29 and her mother, Margaret de Clare, was 17. She married William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros before 25 November 1316. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 18 October 1363, in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Badlesmere est née le 3 décembre 1304, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Clare, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros avant 25 novembre 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1363, à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Badlesmere am 3. Dezember 1304 in Badlesmere, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere 29 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Clare 17. Sie hat vor 25. November 1316 William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1363 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Badlesmere è nata il il 3 dicembre 1304 nel Badlesmere, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Clare, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros prima del 25 novembre 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1363, nel Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Badlesmereが1304年12月3日にイギリスケントバドレスメアで生まれた時，父Sir Bartholomew Badlesmereは29歳，母Margaret de Clareは17歳であった。1316年11月25日以前にWilliam de Ros 2nd Baron de Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1363年10月18日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Badlesmere(이)가 1304년 12월 3일 영국 켄트 바들레스머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Clare(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1316년 11월 25일 이전 William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 10월 18일 영국 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.3 December 1304–18 October 1363: 3 de dezembro de 1304–18 de outubro de 1363
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Badlesmere nasceu em 3 de dezembro de 1304, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Clare, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros antes 25 de novembro de 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1363, em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Badlesmere родилась 3 декабря 1304 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Clare, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros перед 25 ноябрь 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 октября 1363 г. в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.3 December 1304–18 October 1363: 3 de diciembre de 1304–18 de octubre de 1363
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Badlesmere nació el 3 de diciembre de 1304, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret de Clare, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William de Ros 2nd Baron de Ros antes de 25 de noviembre de 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1363, en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
